title: eragrostis triquetra
intro: Eragrostis triquetra, also known as three-square grass or sand grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns. The health benefits of Eragrostis triquetra include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Eragrostis triquetra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
